## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript: `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] Tests: `npm test` passes (added/updated tests if applicable)
- [ ] Build: `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Storybook: component appears correctly with stories
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — all values from `theme.css` tokens
- [ ] No `any` types
- [ ] `forwardRef` used for interactive elements
- [ ] `displayName` set on new components
- [ ] Exported from `src/index.ts` barrel (if new component)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
